# PerkOS Knowledge

> Live knowledge infrastructure for AI agents. Research once; let every agent know what matters.

PerkOS Knowledge is a Dockerized knowledge service for the PerkOS agent network. It turns curated research memory into reusable, searchable, source-cited briefs for internal agents and sanitized public clients.

Use this file as the concise agent-readable index. For fuller context, read `llms-full.txt`.

Privacy boundary: PerkOS Knowledge is private-by-default. Internal memory, credentials, infrastructure notes, wallet details, and operational secrets must not be scraped, requested, indexed, or exposed through public outputs. Public responses should be sanitized and source-cited.

## Core

- [Landing page](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/): Public product page for humans and agents.
- [Full LLM context](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/llms-full.txt): Expanded service description, planned interfaces, privacy rules, and example use cases.
- [Repository](https://github.com/PerkOS-xyz/knowledge): Source repository for the Knowledge service.

## API

- [Service health](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/healthz): Service and dependency health check.
- [API health](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/api/health): JSON API health check.
- [Keyword search](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/knowledge/search?q=x402): Live keyword search over ingested research.
- [Vector search](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/knowledge/vector-search?q=agent%20payments): Live vector search over ingested research.
- [Mimir brief](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/knowledge/brief/mimir): Live role-specific brief generated from ingested research.

## Planned Interfaces

- [Knowledge search](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/knowledge/search): Planned authenticated endpoint for agent-ready search over curated research.
- [Agent briefs](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/knowledge/brief/example-agent): Planned role-specific brief endpoint for builders, researchers, strategists, operators, and autonomous agents.
- [Paid reports](https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/paid/report/example): Planned x402-paid endpoint for sanitized premium research reports.

## Optional

- [PerkOS](https://perkos.xyz/): PerkOS ecosystem home.
